description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a corrugated metal gable roof, showing signs of weathering and rust. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, framed by thicker wooden beams at the corners and around the windows. The cabin features multiple rectangular windows with wooden frames, some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing natural light to the interior. The foundation appears to be made of stone or brick, elevating the structure slightly above ground level. A covered porch extends from one side of the cabin, supported by wooden posts and partially enclosed, offering a sheltered entryway. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, weathered structure suitable for rural or edge-of-urban environments.
description: A weathered wooden cabin with a corrugated metal gable roof, multiple windows, and a covered side porch.
description_view_0: Front and side of the cabin with two windows and a covered porch visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing a single large window and the full length of the corrugated roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two windows and the wooden plank construction clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring three windows in a row and the stone or brick foundation.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels and visible rust, featuring a main section and a smaller offset extension over the porch
attribute_window_arrangement: Five rectangular windows: two on the front facade, one large window on the left side, and three windows grouped together on the right side, all with wooden frames and arranged asymmetrically
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the right side beneath the covered porch, providing access from the porch area
